title: GrandTies Stainless Steel Dog Bowl | Engraved Reusable BPA-Free Insulated Cat Bowls | Large Heavy Duty Non Skid Spill Proof Dog Bowl (64oz, Ivory White)
features: EXCELLENT INSULATION FOR FRESHNESS: double-wall vacuum insulation keeps water cool and inviting for hours, catering to pets of all sizes. Your pet can enjoy icy sips even on hot days, ensuring their thirst is always quenched.

VERSATILE PET BOWL: all-purpose stainless dog bowls perfect for water, premium cuts or kibble. Ideal for all pets, from playful kittens to energetic labrador, offering them a feast that satisfies hunger and thirst alike.
International products have separate terms, are sold from abroad and may differ from local products, including fit, age ratings, and language of product, labeling or instructions.
description: Chilled to Purrfection Imagine your pet savoring a refreshingly cold sip of water even on the hottest of days. Our advanced insulation technology makes it a reality. Enjoy peace of mind knowing that your pet's water will remain cool and inviting, providing a fresh and enjoyable drinking experience throughout the day. From Paws to Whiskers These stainless steel dog bowls extend an open invitation to all pets, from energetic kittens and Spaniel to majestic Great Dane and Maine coons, offering them a feast that satisfies hunger and thirst alike. The bowls double as all-purpose containers, whether for kibble or water. Choose the perfect size: 5 cup (42 ounce) or 8 cup (64 ounce), ensuring every pet's need is met. Rest assured, our 18/8 food grade stainless steel guarantees safety and insulation. Cleansing Simplicity Embrace a life made easier with GrandTies' top rack dishwasher-safe pet bowls, fortified with a stainless steel core and a durable powder coating. Rest easy knowing these pet water bowl are constructed from food-grade 18/8 stainless steel, promoting the well-being of your beloved pets. The spill proof dog water bowl built-in rubber pads ensure stability, making mealtime enjoyable for your furry companions. A Gift of Durability These pet bowls transcend functionality, becoming a vivid expression of love and care. Available in a spectrum of sizes and hues, they harmonize aesthetics and utility. Banish mealtime woes, welcome culinary dreams, and let your pet dine in splendor as these bowls redefine the art of feeding. With a clever grip design, accidents are minimized, leaving your kitchen floor unblemished. Crafted for longevity, these premium stainless-steel bowls embrace food safety, making them the perfect choice for your pet's health.

specifications_table.Care Instructions: ‎Clean after Use, Hand Wash Only, Dishwasher Safe
